subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope and ultimate Aspiration! Verily, Thy servant, submissive before Thy sovereignty, lowly before Thy grandeur, believing in Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غایه منائی ان عبدک الخاضع لسلطنتک الخاشع لعظمتک المومن بک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
